name: Point Axis Target
description: Create a PointAxisTarget for tools with cylindrical symmetry (drilling, milling, 3D printing). Rotation around the target Z axis is unconstrained.

inputParameters.name: point
inputParameters.description: Target point in WCF. Accepts Rhino Point or COMPAS Point.

inputParameters.name: target_z_axis
inputParameters.description: Direction the tool's Z axis must align with. Rotation around this axis is free. Accepts Rhino Vector or COMPAS Vector.

inputParameters.name: tolerance_position
inputParameters.description: Position tolerance in meters. If unset, the planner default is used.

inputParameters.name: tolerance_orientation
inputParameters.description: Orientation tolerance in radians. If unset, the planner default is used.

inputParameters.name: native_scale
inputParameters.description: Scale factor: user_value * native_scale = meters. Use 0.001 for millimeter documents. Defaults to 1.0.
